heading: Amount of fellowships
label: 4508 Amount of fellowships
text: Each student awarded a fellowship shall receive a stipend which shall not exceed the cost to the student for tuition, fees, books, room and board, or $12,000, whichever is less, for each academic year of study.
notes: Codificationis a corrected version of .Pub. L. 99–591Pub. L. 99–500
